pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17 features, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target compiler configuration with the modern release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: The source and target options are deprecated in newer JDKs and Maven compiler plugin versions; using release is required for correct cross-compilation and module path handling in Java 21.

src/main/java/md/utm/restaurant/domain/U.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/md/utm/restaurant/domain/U.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial on serialVersionUID, the code may fail to compile with --enable-preview or fail static analysis tools enforcing Java 21 standards.

src/main/java/md/utm/restaurant/service/.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/md/utm/restaurant/service/.why_exists: Java 21 enforces stricter serialization checks; without @Serial, the compiler may warn or error depending on configuration, and it is required for correct serialization metadata in modern Java.

src/main/java/md/utm/restaurant/service/.general_idea: Import java.io.Serial to support the @Serial annotation.
src/main/java/md/utm/restaurant/service/.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is in java.io package; without the import, the code will not compile.

src/main/java/md/utm/restaurant/service/.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/md/utm/restaurant/service/.why_exists: Java 21 enforces stricter serialization checks; without @Serial, the code may fail to compile or trigger warnings/errors depending on the compiler configuration (e.g., --enable-preview or strict serialization checks).

src/main/java/md/utm/restaurant/service/.general_idea: Import java.io.Serial to support the @Serial annotation.
src/main/java/md/utm/restaurant/service/.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is part of java.io package; without the import, the code will not compile.
